description: Style Notepolice Uomo, for men, is an aromatic spicy fragnance, available in a goldenish yellow flacon.Product DetailsTop notes are pimento and cardamom middle notes are violet, sage and geranium base notes are sandalwood, amber and muskCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSizeQuantity: 100 ml
